---
title: "TITLE_HERE"
date: today
categories: [CATEGORY_HERE]
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


## Overview

Brief description of the topic.

## Key Concepts

### Definition 1
::: {.callout-note}
## Definition
Define key terms here.
:::

### Theorem 1
::: {.callout-important}
## Theorem
State the theorem here.

**Proof:** 
Proof goes here.
:::

## Examples

### Example 1
Work through a concrete example.

## Applications

How this applies to telecommunications/networking.

## References

- Source 1
- Source 2

---

*Related: [Link to related note]()*
